items.headline: How Investors May Respond To Abbott (ABT) Dividend And CE Mark For Dual Glucose‑Ketone Sensor
items.summary: Earlier this month, Abbott’s board declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.63 per share, payable on August 17, 2026, to shareholders of record on July 15, marking the company’s 410th consecutive quarterly payout since 1924. At the same time, Abbott secured CE Mark for its Libre Duo dual glucose‑ketone sensors and expanded a commercialization agreement with MiniMed, underscoring how its diabetes technology is targeting diabetic ketoacidosis risks highlighted by recent company-backed...

items.headline: Abbott Laboratories (ABT): One of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June
items.summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 12, BofA analyst Travis Steed reduced the firm’s price objective on the company’s stock to $102 from $120 and maintained a “Buy” rating on the shares.
